title: Annual cleanup day at Rose Hill Cemetery
description:
Event date: April 1, 2026
Event Time: 12:00 AM - 11:59 PM
Location:
255 Ash St
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
The annual cleanup day at Rose Hill Cemetery is Wednesday, April 1, when cemetery staff will be picking up decorations around the monuments in preparation for the summer. They will collect items that are protruding past the foundation of the monuments, in the ground surrounding the monuments, or items that have become unsightly.

title: Autumn Trio musical performance
description:
Event date: April 1, 2026
Event Time: 05:30 PM - 06:30 PM
Location:
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
The Autumn Trio will perform their popular arrangements of folk and classical music. The trio features Katrina Garnett on flute, Chris Davis on guitar, and Rodney Garnett on alto flute and 19th century flute

title: Fiber Arts Group
description:
Event date: April 2, 2026
Event Time: 05:00 PM - 06:30 PM
Location:
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
Join fellow hobbyists for social time while you knit, crochet, stitch, etc. All ages welcome, but children should be accompanied by an adult. No instruction will be provided. Bring your own project.

title: Community Egg Hunt
description:
Event date: April 4, 2026
Event Time: 10:00 AM - 10:30 AM
Location:
115 S Canyon St
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
Bring your family and neighbors for a morning of fun and springtime tradition!
Join us at 10 a.m. Saturday, April 4, at Spearfish City Park (the hunt begins promptly at 10 a.m., so plan to arrive early!).
